message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.41 for release

Includes 12 commits since v0.1.40 covering doctor/sync/import/lock
hardening (see git log).  Pre-release housekeeping:

- cargo fmt: reformat create.rs / markdown_import.rs / tests
- Cargo.toml: allow more stylistic nursery/pedantic clippy lints
  (option_if_let_else, map_unwrap_or, similar_names, redundant_clone,
  too_long_first_doc_paragraph, missing_errors_doc,
  struct_excessive_bools, if_not_else) which surfaced from nightly
  clippy drift in the 0.1.40..HEAD range.
- config/mod.rs: collapse nested if-let into chained && to silence
  collapsible_if.
- tests/e2e_workspace_commands.rs: rename unused wal_path to _wal_path.
- sync.rs: add post-rebuild VACUUM + REINDEX on --force/--rebuild
  imports to eliminate B-tree/index corruption artifacts (issue #248).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -284,7 +284,14 @@ task
     // --parent with --file sets a global default parent for imported issues
     let output = run_br(
         &workspace,
-        ["create", "--file", "issues.md", "--parent", &parent_id, "--json"],
+        [
+            "create",
+            "--file",
+            "issues.md",
+            "--parent",
+            &parent_id,
+            "--json",
+        ],
         "create_parent_arg",
     );
     assert!(
